stripLocation.label: Strip Location Data
stripLocation.help: Remove GPS coordinates and location metadata (latitude, longitude, altitude, country, state, city, sublocation) from uploaded images. Non-location EXIF data (camera, lens, exposure, author, copyright, date) is preserved. Useful for GDPR compliance and privacy protection.

watermarksGallery.label: Watermark Gallery
watermarksGallery.help: The ID of the gallery where watermarks should be uploaded to. If not set, the default watermarks ID will be used.

watermarkFontsDepot.label: Watermark Fonts Depot
watermarkFontsDepot.help: The ID of the depot where TTF font files for text watermarks should be uploaded to. If not set, the default watermark-fonts ID will be used.

defaults.label: ImageWorks Defaults
defaults.help: Default parameters applied to all image generation. Common options include format (fm), quality (q), fit, and more. See ImageWorks documentation for all available parameters.

presets.label: ImageWorks Presets
presets.help: JSON that defines presets that can be used for image generation. See the ImageWorks documentation for details on all of the parameters that can be used.
